design_philosophy: E1: Emotion First. Breaking the 'fast-food' mold by treating food delivery like a premium, editorial dining experience. Using warm, earthy tones with high-end editorial typography to convey freshness and quality over cheap speed. Generous spacing and tactile surfaces replace chaotic, dense grids.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C65D47] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#A64D3A] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#EFEBE4] text-[#2C2A28] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#E4DFD6] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#EFEBE4] text-[#2C2A28] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:border-[#C65D47] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.floating_action: absolute bottom-6 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-[#C65D47] text-white rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center

cards.restaurant_card: bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 overflow-hidden shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] flex flex-col transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
cards.tiffin_card: bg-[#EFEBE4] rounded-[2rem] p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 border border-transparent hover:border-black/5

inputs.default: bg-[#F3EFEA] border-none rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 w-full text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C65D47]/30 transition-all
inputs.search: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-full px-6 py-4 w-full shadow-sm pl-12 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C65D47]/30

navigation.bottom_tab: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-black/5 pb-safe pt-4 px-6 flex justify-around items-center

specific_flows.home_discovery: Use a 'Bento' grid style for the top section instead of standard carousels. Highlight one 'Hero' restaurant prominently.
specific_flows.zero_waste_toggle: Must be visually distinct. Use the Moss Green (#4A6B53) color when active, with a smooth sliding animation and a leaf icon.
specific_flows.tiffin_subscription: Horizontal scroll for 7-day view. Days should look like premium calendar date cells. High-quality closeups of the meal boxes.
specific_flows.direct_chat: Clean, unbranded WhatsApp feel. Use off-white background with subtle noise texture for the chat area.
specific_flows.group_order: Avatars of group members overlapping at the top. 'Add your items' button floating at bottom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes mapped to React Native components (or Web components if simulating App via Next/React).
NEVER use plain cards for food items; utilize `rounded-[2rem]` with large border radii to make the app feel tactile and approachable.
Do not use generic stock avatars. If you need avatars, use a reliable generic image service, but prefer initial-based avatars for reliability.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Use `Cormorant Garamond` for headings. If implementing in React Native, ensure the font is loaded, or fallback to a serif font.
Implement the Zero-Waste packaging toggle prominently in the cart, making it feel rewarding (e.g., color shift).
For the Tiffin Subscription, make the 7-day/30-day selector massive and impossible to miss, utilizing horizontal scroll.
